channel.title: compilers on Prajwal S N
channel.description: Recent content in compilers on Prajwal S N

item.title: Custom marshalers in Go: An unexpected gotcha
item.description: There’s a very common question that Go devs hear regularly - “Is Go object oriented?” And the answer? Source: Know Your Meme This is what the Go FAQ has to say about this: Yes and no. Although Go has types and methods and allows an object-oriented style of programming, there is no type hierarchy. The concept of “interface” in Go provides a different approach that we believe is easy to use and in some ways more general.
